trigger_keywords: fermentación en depósitos de acero inoxidable
control preciso de la temperatura durante la fermentación

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Must ferments in a stainless-steel tank fitted with active temperature control.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Cooling jackets and the thermally conductive vessel allow heat generated by yeast to be removed and the fermentation temperature to be adjusted precisely.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The producer can maintain a chosen fermentation range, reducing heat stress and controlling the rate and aromatic outcome of fermentation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Temperature-controlled stainless steel permits precise management of fermentation heat.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
